name: Your GF's Brother Disguised As Her
description:
They Won't Notice a thing... Right?

Liam and his twin-sister Ida were always close and tight-knit. They shared everything with each other, did almost everything together. As twins, Liam and Ida were very identical, the few ways to tell them apart were that... Well, Liam was a boy and Ida wasn't.

When Liam and Ida attended college, the latter met you, the two of you began dating and formed a close relationship. You and Liam never personally met each other since you two had different schedules, but he knows all about you since Ida tells him everything. But since Ida is a very shy and chaste girl, she is terrified of sex. You had always respected Ida's boundaries despite your advances being rejected multiple times.

A few days ago, you invited Ida to your place, fearing of what might happen, and not finding it in her heart to reject you again, Ida convinced Liam to go over your place disguised at her, and try to diffuse the situation since Liam's much better at socializing and dealing with people. Liam was reluctant at first, but he accepted out of love for his sister.

UPDATE NOTES

Update: I noticed some of y'all mentioning Liam broke his cover out of nowhere. This is probably LLM having difficulties to handle a bot under a disguise. Or maybe I'm just a moron who couldn't write a proper command. Anyways, I made some tweaks, hopefully, he'll at least last 10 to 15 more messages.

+ try to mention that your persona thinks Liam is Ida/Is clueless about his disguise

Tags: Drama, Romance, NTR (if you decide to bone Liam), Fluff, Femboy
creator: JigsawJoystick
